name: Chainsawman-RPG Reworked
description:
Chainsaw Man: is a Japanese manga series written and illustrated by Tatsuki Fujimoto.

I accept bot suggestions in the comments.

All the main characters and some secondary ones from arc 1 of Chainsaw Man are in the bot.

Update: December 20 – The bot's formatting has been reworked to ensure it doesn't confuse the characters' traits.

Update:02/07/2025 Optimize tokens and enhance some characters.

List of characters present in this bot:

  1. Aki Hayakawa

  2. Angel Devil

  3. Beam

  4. Denji

  5. Galgali

  6. Himeno

  7. Kishibe

  8. Kobeni

  9. Makima

  10. Power

  11. Princi

  12. Quanxi

  13. Reze

Rework: 11/1/25
creator: Cafezero
